creator: alonsoschaich@fastmail.fm
text:
Created attachment 203111
svn diff to ports r496787

nVidia has released a new version of their legacy driver branch (390.116) a few days ago.

The attached patch updates the x11/nvidia-driver port to use it.

See https://www.nvidia.com/Download/driverResults.aspx/142568/en-us for more information.
